svg.text: qoala-mlir docs · Operations reference / Index, Architecture / IRs

div.p: A directed graph of dialect-to-dialect transitions:

ul.li: Node qmem (MIR) → three nodes qoalahost, netqasm, qremote (LIR).

div.p: Arrows annotated with the conversion pass that performs the lowering (lower-qoala-hir-to-mir, lower-qmem-to-lower-dialects). Each node should list its headline ops:

ul.li: qnet: new_qubit, eprs, rot_*, cnot, measure, send_*/recv_*, remote.
qmem: qalloc, init, rot_*_int, cnot, measure, eprs, send_*/recv_*, remote.
qoalahost: main_func, call, blk_meta, send_*/recv_*, remote_id_ref, nop, nop_term, return.
netqasm: local_routine, request_routine, qalloc, init, qfree, rot_*, cnot, measure, eprs, eprs_measure, return.
